verses.1: Praise waits for you, God, in Zion.
verses.4: Blessed is the one whom you choose and cause to come near,
verses.5: By awesome deeds of righteousness, you answer us,
verses.6: By your power, you form the mountains,
verses.7: You still the roaring of the seas,
verses.8: They also who dwell in faraway places are afraid at your wonders.
verses.9: You visit the earth, and water it.
verses.11: You crown the year with your bounty.
verses.13: The pastures are covered with flocks.
